title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 392.451 - State adopts federal exemption for certain rural telephone companies
text:
392.451.  State adopts federal exemption for certain rural telephone companies. — The state of Missouri hereby adopts and incorporates in total the provisions of section 251(f)(1) of the federal Telecommunications Act of 1996 providing exemption for certain rural telephone companies.
(L. 1996 S.B. 507, A.L. 2008 H.B. 1779)
